arcane_missile.name: Arcane Missile
arcane_missile.description: Setup/Builder: A bolt of pure mana. Generates 15 Concentration and 1 Mana Pip.

mana_infusion.name: Mana Infusion
mana_infusion.description: Setup: Overcharge your mana pool. Generates 2 Mana Pips and grants [Empowered].

arcane_barrage.name: Arcane Barrage
arcane_barrage.description: Payoff: A continuous stream of bolts. Consumes all Mana Pips to deal damage per pip consumed.

mana_burst.name: Mana Burst
mana_burst.description: Payoff/AOE: An eruption of pure arcane force. Consumes 3 Mana Pips to deal AOE damage in the room.

arcane_shield.name: Arcane Shield
arcane_shield.description: Defense: Surround yourself with a field of force. Absorbs incoming damage using your Concentration pool.

spell_lock.name: Spell Lock
spell_lock.description: Defense/Disruption: Disrupt an enemy's spellcasting for 4 ticks.

arcane_dash.name: Arcane Dash
arcane_dash.description: Mobility: Teleport to any visible location instantly.

enchant_weapon.name: Enchant Weapon
enchant_weapon.description: Utility: Temporarily grant an ally's weapon bonus Arcane damage for 20 ticks.

magician_physiology.name: Magician Physiology
magician_physiology.description: Passive: Pure Arcane. Your Magic power is increased by 10% and you gain 5 Concentration every time an ally casts a spell nearby.
